title: Retiring GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini in ChatGPT

structured_analysis.background: OpenAI Blog 于 2026-04-03 发布相关动态。
structured_analysis.key_action: OpenAI announced the retirement of GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and o4-mini from ChatGPT
structured_analysis.technical_implication: The retirement was driven by the fact that the vast majority of usage has shifted to GPT-5.2, with only 0.1% of users still choosing GPT-4o each day

trend_insight: 模型能力竞争正从单点指标转向长上下文、多模态和 Agent 执行能力。
risk_or_opportunity: 需关注合规约束、能力退役或生态迁移带来的执行风险。
original_title: Retiring GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini in ChatGPT
